name: pscp-vscode
description: VS Code support for the PSCP programming language.

pscp.sdkPath.description: Path to an installed `pscp.exe` or to the PSCP installation directory. Kept for compatibility; prefer `pscp.server.path` for the language server.

pscp.languageServerPath.description: Optional direct path to `Pscp.LanguageServer.exe` or `Pscp.LanguageServer.dll`. Kept for compatibility; prefer `pscp.server.path`.

pscp.server.path.description: Optional direct path to `Pscp.LanguageServer.exe`, `Pscp.LanguageServer.dll`, an installed `pscp.exe`, or the PSCP installation directory.

pscp.server.args.description: Extra arguments passed to a direct language server executable.

pscp.server.trace.description: Write LSP request and notification names to the PSCP output channel.

pscp.server.requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for foreground language feature requests.

pscp.transpiler.path.description: Optional direct path to `pscp.exe` for transpile/run commands.

pscp.transpiler.args.description: Extra arguments appended to PSCP transpile/run commands.
